tasks.label: debug-header
args: const fs=require('fs'); const text=fs.readFileSync('Bloom Test Plan.csv','utf8'); function parseCsv(t){const rows=[];let row=[],v='',q=false; for(let i=0;i<t.length;i++){const c=t[i],n=t[i+1]; if(q){ if(c==='"'){ if(n==='"'){v+='"';i++;} else q=false;} else v+=c; continue;} if(c==='"'){q=true;continue;} if(c===','){row.push(v);v='';continue;} if(c==='\r') continue; if(c==='\n'){row.push(v); rows.push(row); row=[]; v=''; continue;} v+=c;} if(v.length||row.length){row.push(v); rows.push(row);} return rows;} const rows=parseCsv(text); const r0=rows[0], r1=rows[1]; for(let i=30;i<=55;i++){ console.log(i, JSON.stringify(r0[i]||''), '|', JSON.stringify(r1[i]||'')); }

tasks.label: test-raw-create
args: const {execFileSync}=require('node:child_process'); process.env.NOTION_TOKEN=process.env.BLOOM_TESTCASE_NOTION; const body=JSON.stringify({parent:{data_source_id:'3304bb19-df12-8047-8d80-000b4fcb271f'},properties:{Name:{title:[{text:{content:'TEMP RAW API CASE'}}]},'Import ID':{rich_text:[{text:{content:'temp-raw-api-case'}}]},Priority:{select:{name:'1'}},'Past Issues':{rich_text:[]}}}); const out=execFileSync('notion',['api','POST','/pages','--data',body],{encoding:'utf8'}); console.log(out);

tasks.label: test-direct-notion-api
args: const token=process.env.BLOOM_TESTCASE_NOTION; if(!token) throw new Error('no token'); fetch('https://api.notion.com/v1/pages/3334bb19df128189af40d3a244e0a34a',{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`,'Notion-Version':'2022-06-28'}}).then(async r=>{console.log(r.status); console.log((await r.text()).slice(0,500));}).catch(e=>{console.error(e); process.exit(1);});

tasks.label: probe-case-page
args: const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const state=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join('build','notion-state.json'),'utf8')); const token=process.env.BLOOM_TESTCASE_NOTION; const id=state.cases['src-2300'].pageId.replace(/-/g,''); fetch(`https://api.notion.com/v1/pages/${id}`,{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`,'Notion-Version':'2022-06-28'}}).then(r=>r.json().then(j=>({status:r.status,body:j}))).then(({status,body})=>{ const p=body.properties||{}; const plain=(prop)=>{ if(!prop) return ''; if(prop.type==='title') return (prop.title||[]).map(x=>x.plain_text||'').join(''); if(prop.type==='rich_text') return (prop.rich_text||[]).map(x=>x.plain_text||'').join(''); if(prop.type==='select') return prop.select?.name||''; return ''; }; console.log(JSON.stringify({status,testCase:plain(p['Test Case']),caseCode:plain(p['Case Code']),steps:plain(p['Steps']),importId:plain(p['Import ID'])},null,2)); }).catch(err=>{ console.error(err); process.exit(1); });

tasks.label: find-missing-imports
args: const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cases=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join('build','bloom-cases.json'),'utf8')); const runs=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join('build','bloom-runs.json'),'utf8')); const state=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join('build','notion-state.json'),'utf8')); const missingCases=cases.filter(x=>!state.cases[x.importId]).map(x=>x.importId); const missingRuns=runs.filter(x=>!state.runs[x.importRunId]).map(x=>x.importRunId); console.log(JSON.stringify({missingCases,missingRunsCount:missingRuns.length,missingRuns:missingRuns.slice(0,50)},null,2));

tasks.label: final-status-counts
args: const fs=require('fs'); const s=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/notion-state.json','utf8')); const f=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/notion-import-failures.json','utf8')); const cases=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/bloom-cases.json','utf8')); const runs=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/bloom-runs.json','utf8')); console.log(JSON.stringify({stateCases:Object.keys(s.cases||{}).length,stateRuns:Object.keys(s.runs||{}).length,expectedCases:cases.length,expectedRuns:runs.length,caseFailures:(f.cases||[]).length,runFailures:(f.runs||[]).length},null,2));

tasks.label: unique-key-counts
args: const fs=require('fs'); const cases=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/bloom-cases.json','utf8')); const runs=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/bloom-runs.json','utf8')); const caseIds=new Set(cases.map(x=>x.importId)); const runIds=new Set(runs.map(x=>x.importRunId)); const dupCases=cases.length-caseIds.size; const dupRuns=runs.length-runIds.size; console.log(JSON.stringify({caseRows:cases.length,uniqueCases:caseIds.size,duplicateCaseRows:dupCases,runRows:runs.length,uniqueRuns:runIds.size,duplicateRunRows:dupRuns},null,2));

args: $env:NOTION_TOKEN=$env:BLOOM_TESTCASE_NOTION; $env:IMPORT_SKIP_RUNS='1'; $env:IMPORT_CONCURRENCY='2'; $env:IMPORT_RETRY_COUNT='8'; $env:IMPORT_RETRY_DELAY_MS='4000'; $env:IMPORT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS='45000'; Remove-Item Env:IMPORT_SKIP_CASES -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:IMPORT_ONLY_CASE_IDS -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:IMPORT_ONLY_RUN_IDS -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:IMPORT_ALLOW_LOOKUP -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:IMPORT_LIMIT_CASES -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:IMPORT_LIMIT_RUNS -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; node scripts/import-to-notion.mjs .

tasks.label: final-unique-status
args: const fs=require('fs'); const cases=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/bloom-cases.json','utf8')); const runs=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/bloom-runs.json','utf8')); const state=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/notion-state.json','utf8')); const failures=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/notion-import-failures.json','utf8')); const uniqueCases=new Set(cases.map(x=>x.importId)); const uniqueRuns=new Set(runs.map(x=>x.importRunId)); console.log(JSON.stringify({importedCases:Object.keys(state.cases||{}).length,expectedUniqueCases:uniqueCases.size,importedRuns:Object.keys(state.runs||{}).length,expectedUniqueRuns:uniqueRuns.size,caseFailures:(failures.cases||[]).length,runFailures:(failures.runs||[]).length},null,2));
